column1: # Magical and technological enhancements for items and equipment
# Mods: Add or override rows to customize enchantments

column20: description

column1: # === CURSED ENCHANTS (negative effects found on loot or applied by enemies) ===

column20: Drastically reduces item durability causing it to break quickly
Triples the item weight making it cumbersome to carry
Makes the item produce loud sounds alerting nearby creatures
Drains the user's hunger meter faster while equipped
Reduces luck stat causing worse loot drops and more failures
Generates false threat indicators on the HUD causing confusion
Attracts hostile creatures from a wider radius while equipped
Item slowly loses durability over time even when not in use
